However, influenced by the dark fantasy novels she read during her teenage years, she has developed a severe case of “Chuunibyou,” and because her words and actions are so chaotic, those around her keep their distance. She has a strange chemistry with the protagonist and looks up to him as someone bound to her by a karmic connection from a past life. When she’s herself, she’s a socially awkward young lady.
高位聖職者の名家の娘である見習いシスター。真面目な性格で、誰かに騙されても気づか: An apprentice nun who comes from a distinguished family of high-ranking clergy. She has a serious disposition and is so trusting that she doesn’t even realize when someone is trying to deceive her. She serves at the church in the frontline base, where her warm personality has earned her the trust of many as a confidante. Her words carry such conviction that even the cynical protagonist finds himself changing his mind after hearing her sermons. However, she herself worries whether she is truly helping those around her by simply listening to their concerns.
ペルディオンの魔法学校落第生。単位取得のため前線基地に来る。魔力は豊富だが放出が: A failing student at Perdion Magic Academy. She comes to the frontline base to earn credits. She has abundant magical power but struggles to channel it effectively. She excels by combining her hobby of martial arts with magic, but since the academy doesn’t recognize this as “magic,” she keeps failing her classes. She’s clearly cut out for martial arts, but she’s fixated on the title of “witch” because, as she puts it, “witches are cuter and more popular.” Currently looking for a boyfriend.
挑発的な言動が目立つ、ペルディオンの魔法使い。魔法を使えない異性を徹底的に馬鹿に:
A mage from Perdion known for her provocative behavior. She thoroughly looks down on members of the opposite sex who can’t use magic, and is particularly harsh toward those older than her. 
She’s well aware of her own cuteness and sometimes puts on a sweet act to carry out her schemes. 
She specializes in fire magic, but when she uses it, she makes a big show of it. She has a younger sister and tends to be very protective of children younger than herself.
エルドラーナ共和国警備隊に所属する真面目な女兵士。商船を襲った海賊を追って前線基:
A dedicated female soldier in the Eldorana Republic Guard. She arrived at the frontline base in pursuit of pirates who had attacked a merchant ship. Although she reluctantly wears the revealing uniform mandated by the Guard’s regulations, she is actually quite self-conscious about it. 
Having survived the rigorous training of the Eldorana Republic Guard, she serves as a dedicated model soldier. She currently leads the “Frontline Base Sexual Harassment Eradication Task Force,” contributing to maintaining public order within the frontline base so that women can live in safety.
のんびりした話し方をするエルドラーナの旅商人。人との間に垣根を作らない性格で、気:
A traveling merchant from Eldrana with a laid-back way of speaking. She has a friendly, approachable personality and tends to make friends with everyone before she even realizes it. 
She can sense what customers are looking for from casual conversation and pulls it out of her impressive bag. 
She may look gentle, but she loves money and magic stones. She’s actually quite calculating, so she’s a bit vulnerable to the unexpected.
森で育った野生児の犬人族。\n両親の顔を知らず、捨て犬のように生きてきたが、食事:
A dog-human hybrid who grew up in the wild. 
Having never known her parents, she lived like a stray dog, but she became attached to the protagonist who fed her and became his loyal subordinate. 
She is honest, earnest, and hardworking, as well as kind and caring. 
However, she tends to act on impulse and can be inflexible at times. 
She fights using her innate physical abilities in a wild, unorthodox style.
ペルディオンにおける採掘の専門家として前線基地にやって来たドワーフ族の女性。\n:
A female dwarf who arrived at the frontline base as a mining expert in Perdion. 
Being a dwarf, she is long-lived, and despite her youthful appearance, she is actually quite old. 
With her wealth of life experience, she always carries herself with composure and treats many people at the frontline base—including the protagonist—as if they were younger children.
ミレスガルドの騎士養成学校で生徒会長を務める侯爵家の令嬢。 \n騎士としての強い:
The daughter of a marquis who serves as student council president at the Millesgard Knight Academy. 
Driven by a strong sense of duty as a knight, she views the Great Abyss as a threat to the world and trains tirelessly every day to defeat it. 
With her earnest personality—one that values discipline and never neglects her training—she is highly respected by those around her. 
However, she actually loves cute things and secretly collects bear-themed mascot merchandise and stuffed animals.
ミレスガルドリーダーであるレイゼリアの副官。\n真面目で責任感溢れる性格で、休日:
The second-in-command to Razelia, the leader of the Millesgard. 
She is serious and highly responsible, often spending her days off drilling the soldiers at the frontline base. 
She harbors feelings for Rezeria that go beyond mere respect; it would be no exaggeration to call her a devoted fan. 
Because the Rezeria she so admires frequently praises the protagonist, she feels jealous and hates him with a passion.
勇気と礼節を重んじる、ミレスガルドの女騎士。主君に呼ばれれば、大穴の果てでも駆け:
A female knight of Miresgard who values courage and courtesy. If summoned by her lord, she will rush to his side even to the ends of the earth.　(She’d rush there even if she weren’t summoned.)
She makes it a daily routine to recite the tenets of chivalry and trains tirelessly every day to protect women, children, and the sick.
Perhaps because she spends so much time training, she’s a bit out of touch with recent trends and fashionable culture. She has a weakness for sweets.
いつも柔らかい笑みを湛えているお淑やかな女性。\nその正体は国籍不明の元暗殺者で:
A gentle woman who always wears a soft smile. 
In reality, she is a former assassin of unknown nationality, and “Ayame” is her code name. With her exceptional skills, she has assassinated countless villains over the years. 
She actually has a bit of a ditzy side, and was hired by the protagonist after mistaking an office job for an assassination assignment. 
Since the protagonist hasn't assigned her any assassination work, she seems to be getting anxious...
「特ダネ」を追い求める新人新聞記者。\n都会生活に憧れを抱き、前線基地への赴任に:
A rookie newspaper reporter on the hunt for a “scoop.”
She yearns for city life and is unhappy about being assigned to a frontline base.
Betting everything on a return to headquarters, she snoops around the commander—the protagonist—to uncover secrets, writing gossip columns whenever she lands a scoop.
For the sake of a “scoop,” she’ll risk her life and infiltrate any location. She has mastered archery for self-defense.
美しい宝石に心を奪われている採掘家。\n諸事情によりかつては盗賊として働いていた:
A miner captivated by beautiful gems. 
Due to various circumstances, she used to work as a thief, but she has since turned over a new leaf. 
Her pickpocketing skills are incredibly sharp, allowing her to steal items from enemies in the blink of an eye. She never steals from her allies and has a strong sense of lawfulness, but she is still somewhat feared by those around her. Her generally expressionless demeanor and terse manner only add to this perception. 
She would like to be able to interact with others with a smile, but the road ahead seems to be a difficult one.
日本から異世界に迷い込んだ普通の少女。 \n口下手でコミュ障気味だが、努力家で誠:
An ordinary girl who found herself lost in a different world after leaving Japan. 
She’s not very articulate and struggles with social interactions, but her hardworking and sincere nature has earned her the affection of those around her. 
While she isn’t particularly good at studying, her steady effort has earned her excellent grades. 
On the other hand, her athletic ability is abysmal, and since she’s not good at close-quarters combat, she relies primarily on long-range gunfire as her main means of fighting.
元貿易商社の用心棒で、200歳を超えるエルフ。\n武器に関する知識が豊富で、その:
A former bodyguard for a trading company, she is an elf over 200 years old. 
She possesses extensive knowledge of weapons and has a keen eye for quality. Hating her boring daily life, she became an explorer at a frontline base in search of excitement. While she is cool and intelligent, she is extremely self-conscious about her small bust. 
She is skilled with a bow, raining down a barrage of arrows on her enemies to wipe them out all at once.
東方から来た怪力少女。生まれたときから怪力で、少し気を抜くと家の壁や物を壊してし:
A girl with superhuman strength from the East. She’s had this strength since birth, and if she lets her guard down even for a moment, she ends up breaking the walls of her house or other objects. She’s easily distracted; if she sees a butterfly flying by, she’ll chase after it. 
Her home village was poor, so she came to the frontline base to make a living. 
Her two pandas (Panpan and Dandan) are her longtime companions, and they can only understand what Xiaolei says.
ペルディオン出身の魔法石細工師。大穴で産出される珍しい鉱石を求め前線基地にやって:
A gemstone artisan from Perdion. She came to the frontline base in search of rare ores mined in the Great Pit. She is extremely shy and speaks in a soft voice, so the gemstone brooch on her chest acts as her spokesperson. 
She is a genius at gemstone craftsmanship, and her works are true works of art. However, she has absolutely no business sense, and because she is so shy, she secretly opens her shop late at night when few customers are around.
ペルディオンの警察組織に所属する魔法銃使い。\n基本的にやる気はないが、勤務態度:
A magic gunner in the Perdion Police Force. 
She generally lacks motivation, but she takes her duties seriously. Her skill with magic guns is among the best in Perdion, and she has received numerous medals. 
She usually comes across as boyish, but she might just reveal a girly side when she’s around someone she has a crush on…?
ミレスガルド出身の女剣士。元冒険者の家族に育てられ、幼い頃から剣技に長け、その素: A female swordswoman from Millesgard. Raised by a family of former adventurers, she has excelled at swordsmanship since childhood and creates sparks with her swift swordplay. Curious and fiercely principled, she came to the frontline base to fight the calamity, but her youthful appearance leads the protagonist to treat her like a child. Although she set out to explore the Great Abyss, her lack of combat experience caused her to cower in the face of monsters on occasion. However, through her encounter with the protagonist, she came to acknowledge her own immaturity and grew into a valuable new asset.
ミレスガルド出身の工兵隊隊長。男所帯で育ったため口調は男性的だが、女の子らしい服:
The captain of the Engineering Corps, hailing from Millesgard. Although she grew up in a household full of men and speaks with a masculine tone, she is a serious-minded girl who longs to wear girly clothes. Her rough-and-tumble subordinates look up to her as an idol. 
She is an explosives specialist, and her specialty is mixing chemicals to make bombs. She is naive and has a phobia of dark, confined spaces due to trauma from a cave collapse, but after meeting the protagonist, she begins to shine as the captain of the engineering corps.
ミレスガルド出身の不良警官。規律が大嫌いで金と酒を愛する、生粋のトラブルメーカー:
A rogue cop from Millesgard. She hates discipline and loves money and alcohol—a troublemaker through and through. Despite her glamorous and beautiful appearance, she’s rough and aggressive on the inside. 
Seeking a place beyond the reach of the law, she ended up at the frontline base, where she’s willing to take on dangerous jobs and gamble as long as it means making money. As a member of the security force, she works every day to maintain order within the base.
前線基地で大道芸をしている凄腕のマジックアーチャー。\n「頑張る人の力になりたい:
A highly skilled magic archer who performs street shows at the frontline base. 
Driven by a desire to “support those who are doing their best,” she gently heals weary soldiers with her smile. She’s something of an idol, so much so that the soldiers have secretly formed a fan club for her. 
While she has a cheerful and kind personality, she’s also a bit of a klutz who trips often. On top of that, she has a tendency to accidentally trigger “lucky pervy moments,” such as landing with her crotch pressed against a man’s face when she falls.
水盆に映る未来を占う少数部族の占い師。大いなる災いを知り、大穴にやってきた。\n:
A fortune-teller from a small tribe who divines the future by gazing into a basin of water. Having foreseen a great calamity, she has come to the Abyss. 
Her divination skills are nothing short of genius, but without her tools, she becomes useless, and if they’re taken away, she reverts to a childlike state. She detests anyone who tries to exploit her powers, so she refuses to read the fortunes of those she dislikes. She usually works at the frontline base and is also skilled at love fortune-telling.
エルドラーナ出身の狙撃手。集団での行動は苦手で、単独行動を取りがち。商人からの暗: A sniper from Eldrana. She struggles with group activities and tends to go it alone. She infiltrated a frontline base on an assassination contract from a merchant, but due to the client’s blunder, she ended up under the protagonist’s command. Because of the keen senses she honed through assassination work, she reacts sensitively to all sorts of things. Despite her cool appearance, she’s quite domestic and skilled at cooking. Perhaps due to work-related stress, she has an unexpected side to her: she loves all things fancy.
平和を愛する聖職者。\nペルディオンで広く尊敬される魔女だった母に憧れ自身も魔女:
A peace-loving priest. 
Inspired by her mother—a widely respected witch in Perdion—she once aspired to become a witch herself, but had to give up that dream due to her naturally low magical power. After her mother’s death, she discovered the church and flourished as a healer, eventually becoming a priest who travels throughout Eldrana. 
She appears serious at first glance, but is actually extremely curious. As a priest, she harbors a secret.
ペルディオン出身の花魔法剣士。父から聞いた主人公の武勇伝に憧れ、衝動的に前線基地: A Flower Magic Swordsman from Perdion. Inspired by the tales of the protagonist’s heroic deeds told by her father, she impulsively made her way to the frontline base. She excels at protecting her comrades with a massive shield imbued with flower magic, though she isn’t particularly skilled at attacking. Pure-hearted and kind, she loves flowers and possesses exceptional knowledge of flora, which allows her to play a key role in resolving an incident at the frontline base. Although she had looked up to the protagonist, she is also somewhat bewildered by the gap between her expectations and reality.
東の国ホウライから来た、明るく元気な巫女。\n天気を司る龍神の声を聞き、天候を予:
A cheerful and energetic shrine maiden from the eastern land of Hourai. 
She possesses the ability to predict the weather by hearing the voice of the Dragon God, who governs the weather. 
However, since the Dragon God is capricious, her weather forecasts are often inaccurate. 
She is deeply devout and easily deceived. This is due to her pure-hearted nature, but she is troubled by the fact that people treat her like a child because of it. 
Furthermore, Hourai’s traditional attire is a bit eccentric, and she often attracts attention without even realizing it.
世界一の格闘家を目指す、格闘少女。\n「強さ」への憧れは純粋無垢であり、いつもポ:
A young fighter aiming to become the world's greatest martial artist. 
Her longing for “strength” is pure and innocent, and she is always a positive optimist. 
She is well-versed in all genres of martial arts, including striking, joint locks, and throws. Having heard rumors that the protagonist is the strongest at the forward base, she has tried to challenge him many times, but has been repeatedly defeated by his strategic cunning.
ミレスガルド出身のむっちり魔道士。生粋の騎士オタクで、推しの姫騎士を追いかけ前線:
A plump mage from Millesgard. She’s a die-hard knight fan who followed her favorite princess knight to the frontline base. 
While she’s an excellent mage, she spends most of her time and energy on fangirling, so she’s also well-versed in the knight corps’ unit formations. She cherishes and always carries a handmade stuffed doll of her favorite princess knight. Even in the heat of battle, she devotes all her energy to cheering on her favorite princess knight.
キョンシーであるため、高い腕力と打たれ強さを誇る少女。四肢がもげても元に戻るが、:
As a Jiangshi, this girl boasts great physical strength and remarkable resilience. Even if her limbs are torn off, they regrow, but she is sensitive to extreme humidity and dryness, so she often sleeps under the floorboards or in closets. 
She has poor complexion and a low body temperature, but her internal organs are still functioning, allowing her to eat and perform other basic functions. She excels at self-deprecating jokes about being a corpse. 
To maintain her vitality, she requires regular maintenance involving the infusion of vital energy; if she lacks this, her movements become sluggish, like those of a zombie.
派手で奇抜な武具ばかりを作る天才鍛冶師。能力を伸ばしたいと思い、あらゆる技術が結:
A genius blacksmith who creates nothing but flashy and eccentric weapons. Eager to hone her skills, she came to this frontline base where all manner of technologies converge. 
While her skills as a blacksmith are top-notch, she’s an intuitive type and terrible at explaining things. As a result, many soldiers are at a loss as to how to handle the weapons she creates. 
She’s incredibly curious; whenever she encounters something she’s never seen before, her eyes light up and she pounces on it. She acts like a dog when she’s attached to the protagonist. She’s happy when you pet her, but she gets all dejected when she gets scolded.
ミレスガルドの暗黒騎士。幽霊のノワールを使役し、その力で戦う。 \nノワールの呪:
The Dark Knight of Millesgard. She commands the ghost Noir and fights using its power. 
Due to Noir’s curse, her growth has stopped, and she looks much younger than her actual age. She likes to act like an older sister, but gets furious when people treat her like an aunt. 
Noir is a free-spirited prankster. Although they cannot exchange words, they communicate through facial expressions and gestures, and Noir sometimes materializes with great emotional intensity.
異世界「お菓子の国」からやってきた三ツ星パティシエの少女。 \nルクスノヴァの料:
A young three-star pastry chef who came from the alternate world known as “Candyland.” 
As Luxnova’s chef, she serves exquisite desserts at the frontline base. 
She’s usually a laid-back, airheaded girl, but when she starts cooking, she moves with the efficiency of a completely different person. 
She also possesses a spirit of inquiry: whenever she discovers a new ingredient, she experiments until she creates original confections.
仕事とご飯が大好きな、けなげで明るいウエイトレス。 \n人に喜ばれ、お金をもらえ:
A cheerful and plucky waitress who loves her job and food. 
She finds supreme joy in making people happy and earning money, and considers the restaurant industry her calling. 
Carrying a massive barrel on her back so she can serve drinks anywhere has built her up, giving her enough strength to toss the barrel effortlessly. 
Dressed in a uniform that highlights her great figure, she’s cheerfully serving drinks again today.
前線基地のはるか東に位置する国「ホウライ」出身の剣士。 \n主君の跡取りである若:
A swordsman from the kingdom of “Hourai,” located far to the east of the frontline base. 
She came to the frontline base to bring back the young lord, who is her master’s heir. 
Her sword strikes are light, but her swordsmanship boasts overwhelming speed. 
She has a cocky personality and finds it hard to be honest. She acknowledges Kotono’s skill, but would never admit it to her face.
植物と会話し、植物に好かれる特異な力を持つダウナーな少女。\n自然と植物が彼女の:
A down-to-earth girl with the unique ability to talk to plants and win their affection. 
Nature and plants are her main companions, and she has few human friends. As a result, she spends most of her time with “Makkun,” a talking magical plant. Although she struggles to communicate with people, she is kind and considerate of others. 
She has dreamed of becoming a botanist since she was a child, and she continues to collect seeds from various plants and compile her own botanical encyclopedia.
自称、エルドラーナ最高の踊り子。幼少期から踊るのが好きで、常に踊りの技術を磨くこ:
She calls herself the greatest dancer in Eldrana. She has loved dancing since childhood and is constantly striving to hone her skills. 
In reality, she is searching for her missing father, and secretly hopes that by becoming a famous dancer, he will find her. 
She always aims to be number one and won’t rest until she is, which often leads to conflicts with others. However, she has a good heart, and it’s not uncommon to see her apologize when she realizes she’s gone too far.
赤ずきんと呼ばれる狩猟部隊の天才少女。\nかわいらしい見た目とは裏腹に、猟銃を手:
A genius young girl in a hunting unit known as “Little Red Riding Hood.”
Despite her cute appearance, she is a skilled hunter who takes down enemies with her rifle.
She has a timid personality and always seems frightened, but when cornered, she instinctively unleashes her power to eliminate enemies. She is unaware of this side of herself, which sometimes creates a distance between her and those around her.
ミレスガルドで水神を祀る神官を務める女性。\n教会の秘術によって作られた水槽に、:
A woman who serves as a priestess dedicated to the Water God in Millesgard. 
She keeps various aquatic creatures, including the water spirit Upa-chan, in a tank created using the church’s arcane magic. 
She’s usually calm, but she has a bit of an otaku streak, suddenly becoming very talkative whenever the topic turns to aquatic creatures. She’s afraid of thunder and often complains that lightning always strikes her.
長寿ゆえ感情は平坦だが、人が大好きなエルフ。\n卓越した魔法と豊富な自然の知識を:
A long-lived elf whose emotions rarely show, yet who dearly loves people.
She possesses exceptional magical talent and extensive knowledge of nature.
Though eager to connect with others, she has a playful habit of spending days lost in thought.
Her wholehearted acceptance and nurturing nature, shaped by an elf's unique sense of time, have earned her serious "mom energy" among the soldiers at the forward base.
She's hopeless in the mornings, and her usual cool demeanor falls apart whenever she tries to drag herself out of bed...?
トレスリアの東にある国「ホウライ」で生まれ育った鬼族の娘。 \n見た目からは想像:
An oni girl born and raised in Hourai, a nation east of Treslia.
She possesses immense strength that belies her appearance, and her masterful swordsmanship has earned the respect of countless warriors.
Her affection for the protagonist runs deep. Despite her graceful demeanor, she is always eager to look after them.
トレスリア地方南部の集落に住んでいた魔族。\n褐色の肌と黒い翼を持ち、召喚魔法が:
A demon who lived in a village in the southern part of the Treslia region. 
She has brown skin and black wings, and excels at summoning magic. 
With a feisty and curious personality,  she set her sights on the protagonist with the intention of enslaving humans,  but ended up being enslaved herself. 
The bitterness of the black coffee she tried to drink, even though she was too young, left her with a trauma, and she can’t even stand the smell of it now.

氷雪のハンマーを振るうドワーフ。\n性格は氷のように冷たく、\nその一撃はすべて: A dwarf who wields a hammer of ice and snow. His nature is as cold as ice, and his strikes freeze everything solid.
岩盤のハンマーを振るうドワーフ。\n性格は岩のように頑固、\nその一撃は大地を粉: A dwarf who wields a hammer of bedrock. His nature is as stubborn as rock, and his strikes pulverize the earth.
聖なるハンマーを振るうドワーフ。\n性格は光のように慈悲深く、\nその一撃は邪悪: A dwarf who wields a sacred hammer. His nature is as compassionate as light, and his strikes drive away evil.
深淵のハンマーを振るうドワーフ。\n性格は闇のように閉鎖的で、\nその一撃は魂を: A dwarf who wields a hammer of the abyss. His nature is as withdrawn as darkness, and his strikes erode the soul.
鋼鉄のハンマーを振るうドワーフ。\n性格は鋼鉄のように冷徹で、\nその一撃はすべ: A dwarf who wields a hammer of steel. His nature is as cold-blooded as steel, and his strikes beat everything into submission.
紅蓮の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、生命を燃え上がらせる情熱。\n陽だ: A dark sorcerer who wields a blazing crimson grimoire. What dwells in his eyes is the passion to ignite life. He heals wounds with a warmth like a sunlit spot.
深海の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、生命を潤いで満たす清涼。\n湧き水: A dark sorcerer who wields a grimoire of the deep sea. What dwells in his eyes is the cool clarity that fills life with vitality. He heals wounds with a purity like spring water.
豊穣の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、生命を育む森羅万象。\n新緑のよう: A dark sorcerer who wields a grimoire of abundance. What dwells in his eyes is all of nature that nurtures life. He revives vitality like fresh greenery.
天空の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、全てを浄化する聖光。\n陽光のよう: A dark sorcerer who wields a grimoire of the heavens. What dwells in his eyes is the holy light that purifies all. He heals wounds with a brilliance like sunlight.
混沌の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、全てを蝕む暗黒。\n月明かりのよう: A dark sorcerer who wields a grimoire of chaos. What dwells in his eyes is the darkness that erodes all. He heals wounds with a tranquility like moonlight.
古代の魔導書を操る魔道士。\nその瞳に宿るは、失われた古代の叡智。\n万象を原初: A dark sorcerer who wields a grimoire of antiquity. What dwells in his eyes is the lost wisdom of ancient times. He restores all things to their primordial state.
業火を操る魔族の女魔法使い。\nその炎は、地獄の業火を思わせる。\n敵を焼き尽く: A demon sorceress who wields hellfire. Her flames are reminiscent of the inferno of hell. Her attacks will not stop until her enemies are burned to ashes.
氷結の魔法を操る魔族の女魔法使い。\nその冷気は、すべてを凍てつかせる。\n彼女: A demon sorceress who wields freezing magic. Her cold freezes everything solid. Her staff turns the battlefield into ice.
土の精霊と契約した魔族の女魔法使い。\nその力は大地を揺るがす。\n彼女の杖は、: A demon sorceress contracted with an earth spirit. Her power shakes the earth. Her staff throws the battlefield into chaos.
光を操る魔族の女魔法使い。\nその魔法は雷撃を生み、敵を撃ち焦がす。\n彼女の杖: A demon sorceress who wields light. Her magic creates lightning, striking and scorching enemies. Her staff turns the battlefield into scorched earth.
闇を操る魔族の女魔法使い。\nその魔法は、敵を恐怖に陥れる。\n敵を闇に葬るまで: A demon sorceress who wields darkness. Her magic plunges enemies into fear. Her attacks will not stop until she buries her enemies in darkness.
空を駆ける女魔法使い。\nその魔法は、風を呼び、嵐を巻き起こす。\n彼女の杖は、: A mage who races across the sky. Her magic calls forth wind and whips up storms. Her staff dominates the heavens.
灼熱の炎を纏いし獣。\n俊敏な動きで獲物に近付き、\n鋭い牙で骨を砕く。: A beast cloaked in scorching flame. It approaches its prey with nimble movements and crushes bones with its sharp fangs.
氷の毛皮を纏いし獣。\n俊敏な動きで獲物に近付き、\n冷たい牙でその血を凍らせる: A beast cloaked in fur of ice. It approaches its prey with nimble movements and freezes their blood with its cold fangs.
大地の力を宿した森の捕食者。\nその咆哮は大地を揺るがし、\n鋭い牙で骨を砕く。: A forest predator imbued with the power of the earth. Its roar shakes the land, and it crushes bones with its sharp fangs.
聖なる光を纏いし獣。\nその毛皮は黄金に輝き、\n鋭い牙で骨を砕く。: A beast cloaked in sacred light. Its fur shines like gold, and it crushes bones with its sharp fangs.
闇の炎を纏いし獣。\n俊敏な動きで獲物に近付き、\n鋭い牙で骨を砕く。: A beast cloaked in dark flame. It approaches its prey with nimble movements and crushes bones with its sharp fangs.
異世界の技術で製造された鉄の獣。\nその動力源は謎だが、機動性に優れ、\n固く鋭: An iron beast manufactured with otherworldly technology. Its power source is a mystery, but it has excellent mobility and attacks intruders with hard, sharp fangs.
紅蓮の魔石を動力源とする炎の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される灼熱の拳は、\nす: A fire android powered by a blazing crimson magic stone. The scorching fists delivered from both arms reduce everything to ashes.
深海の魔石を動力源とする氷の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される絶対零度の拳は、\: An ice android powered by a deep sea magic stone. The absolute-zero fists delivered from both arms freeze everything solid.
大地の魔石を動力源とする岩の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される粉砕の拳は、\nす: A rock android powered by an earth magic stone. The crushing fists delivered from both arms reduce everything to rubble.
聖なる魔石を動力源とする光の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される裁きの拳は、\nす: A light android powered by a sacred magic stone. The judgment fists delivered from both arms purify everything.
深淵の魔石を動力源とする闇の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される終焉の拳は、\nす: A darkness android powered by an abyssal magic stone. The fists of annihilation delivered from both arms obliterate everything.
異世界の技術で造られた鉄の人造人間。\n両腕から繰り出される鉄拳は、すべてを押し: An iron android built with otherworldly technology. The iron fists delivered from both arms crush everything. Its form is like a suit of steel armor with a will of its own.
灼熱の液体を吐き出す粘液状のモンスター。\nその体液に触れた者は大火傷を負う。\: A slime monster that spews scorching liquid. Those who touch its bodily fluids suffer severe burns. If you let your guard down, you'll be burned to a crisp in an instant.
冷気を帯びた液体を吐き出す粘液状のモンスター。\nその体液に触れた者は凍傷を負う: A slime monster that spews liquid charged with cold. Those who touch its bodily fluids suffer frostbite. If you let your guard down, you'll be frozen solid in an instant.
泥状の液体を吐き出す粘液状のモンスター。\nその体液に触れた者は泥まみれになり、: A slime monster that spews mud-like liquid. Those who touch its bodily fluids become covered in mud and slowed down. If you let your guard down, you'll be sunk into the mire in an instant.
光り輝く液体を吐き出す粘液状のモンスター。\nその体液に触れた者は電撃が走り、痺: A slime monster that spews glittering liquid. Those who touch its bodily fluids are jolted by electricity and become paralyzed. If you let your guard down, you'll lose your life in an instant.
毒液を吐き出す粘液状のモンスター。\nその体液に触れた者は毒に侵され、衰弱してい: A slime monster that spews venom. Those who touch its bodily fluids are poisoned and grow weaker. If you let your guard down, it will be too late.
変幻自在の金属生命体。\nその体液は、あらゆる金属を腐食させる。\n油断すれば武: A metamorphic metallic lifeform. Its bodily fluids corrode all metals. If you let your guard down, your weapons will melt away.
炎の翼を持つ女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い鉤爪で肉: A harpy monster with wings of fire. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
氷の翼を持つ女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い鉤爪で肉: A harpy monster with wings of ice. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
森の精霊と一体化した女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い: A harpy monster integrated with a forest spirit. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
激しい雷を操る女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い鉤爪で: A harpy monster that wields violent lightning. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
闇の眷属である女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い鉤爪で: A harpy monster that is a minion of darkness. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
鉄の翼を持つ女面鳥身のモンスター。\n彼女らの歌声は獲物を誘い、\n鋭い鉤爪で肉: A harpy monster with wings of iron. Their songs lure in prey, and they tear flesh with sharp claws and drink blood.
灼熱の刃を振るう女剣士。\nその剣技は、炎の如く荒々しい。\n大穴の発見物を巡る: A swordswoman who wields a scorching blade. Her swordsmanship is as wild as flames. Conflict over the discoveries of the Abyss becomes an unavoidable fate.
氷の刃を振るう女剣士。\nその剣技は、しなやかで冷酷。\n大穴の発見物を巡る戦い: A swordswoman who wields a blade of ice. Her swordsmanship is supple and ruthless. Conflict over the discoveries of the Abyss becomes an unavoidable fate.
大地の力を纏った女戦士。\nその一撃は、岩をも砕く。\n大穴の発見物を巡る戦いは: A female warrior cloaked in the power of the earth. Her strikes can shatter even rock. Conflict over the discoveries of the Abyss becomes an unavoidable fate.
神に仕えし女戦士。\nだが、その心は、狂信に染まっている。\n彼女は神の名の下に: A female warrior who serves the gods. But her heart is stained with fanaticism. In the name of God, she bares her fangs at the protagonists.
邪悪な力に魅入られた女戦士。\nその心は、憎悪と復讐に燃えている。\n大穴の発見: A female warrior possessed by an evil power. Her heart burns with hatred and revenge. In the conflict over the discoveries of the Abyss, she becomes an avenger of darkness.
熟練の技を誇る女剣士。\nその剣技は、あらゆる状況に対応できる。\n大穴の発見物: A swordswoman who boasts masterful skill. Her swordsmanship can adapt to any situation. Conflict over the discoveries of the Abyss becomes an unavoidable fate.
灼熱の炎を纏いし守護者。\nその刃は、相手を焼き尽くす。\n兜の下に隠された顔は: A guardian cloaked in scorching flame. Their blade incinerates the opponent. The face hidden beneath the helmet is filled with flames of rage.
氷の刃を振るう守護者。\nその剣技は、水のようにしなやかで、そして冷酷。\n兜の: A guardian who wields a blade of ice. Their swordsmanship is as fluid as water, and merciless. The expression hidden beneath the helmet is always composed.
大地の力を纏いし守護者。\nその片手剣は、岩をも砕く。\n兜の下に隠された素顔は: A guardian cloaked in the power of the earth. Their one-handed sword can shatter even rock. The true face hidden beneath the helmet never wavers.
神々の使者たる守護者。\nその刃は、神の裁きを執行する。\n兜の下に隠された顔は: A guardian who is a messenger of the gods. Their blade executes the judgment of the gods. The face hidden beneath the helmet is stained with fanaticism.
邪悪な力に魅入られた守護者。\nその心は、憎悪と復讐に燃えている。\n兜の下には: A guardian possessed by an evil power. Their heart burns with hatred and revenge. Beneath the helmet swirls an unfathomable darkness.
流浪の守護者。\nその剣技は、あらゆる状況に対応できる。\n兜の下に隠された素顔: A wandering guardian. Their swordsmanship can adapt to any situation. No one knows the true face hidden beneath the helmet.
炎を操る魔法使い。\nその杖は、灼熱の弾丸を放つ。\n戦場を焼き尽くすまで、彼の: A mage who wields flame. His staff fires scorching bullets. His attacks will not stop until the battlefield is burned to ashes.
氷結の魔法を操る魔法使い。\nその杖は、氷の矢を放ち、敵を凍てつかせる。\n戦場: A mage who wields freezing magic. His staff fires arrows of ice, freezing enemies solid. His attacks will not stop until the battlefield is encased in ice.
大地を操る魔法使い。\nその杖は、岩の弾丸を放ち、敵を粉砕する。\n戦場を瓦礫の: A mage who wields the earth. His staff fires bullets of rock, crushing enemies. His attacks will not stop until the battlefield is turned into a mountain of rubble.
光を操る魔法使い。\nその杖は、光の矢を放ち、敵を撃ち抜く。\n戦場を焦土と化す: A mage who wields light. His staff fires arrows of light, piercing through enemies. His attacks will not stop until the battlefield is turned into scorched earth.
闇を操る魔法使い。\nその力は、敵を恐怖に陥れる。\n戦場を闇で包み込むまで、彼: A mage who wields darkness. His power plunges enemies into fear. His attacks will not stop until the battlefield is enveloped in darkness.
空を操る魔法使い。\nその杖は、風の弾丸を放ち、敵を吹き飛ばす。\n彼の攻撃は戦: A mage who wields air. His staff fires bullets of wind, blowing enemies away. His attacks throw the battlefield into confusion.
火の精霊と契約したエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、灼熱の炎を纏い敵を焼き尽くす。\: An elf archer contracted with a fire spirit. Their arrows, cloaked in scorching flame, incinerate enemies. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
水の精霊と契約したエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、凍てつく冷気を纏い敵を凍結させる: An elf archer contracted with a water spirit. Their arrows, cloaked in freezing cold, freeze enemies solid. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
大地の精霊と契約したエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、大地の力を凝縮した岩の矢となり: An elf archer contracted with an earth spirit. Their arrows become rock arrows condensed with the power of the earth, crushing enemies. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
光の精霊と契約したエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、敵を光で包み込む。\n森の守護者: An elf archer contracted with a light spirit. Their arrows envelop enemies in light. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
闇の精霊と契約したエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、邪悪な闇を纏い、敵を闇に葬る。\: An elf archer contracted with a dark spirit. Their arrows, cloaked in evil darkness, consign enemies to oblivion. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
空を司るエルフの弓使い。\nその矢は、空気を切り裂き敵を貫く。\n森の守護者とし: An elf archer who commands air. Their arrows tear through the air and pierce enemies. As guardians of the forest, they never forgive intruders.
灼熱の炎を操る修道士。\nその手は、傷を癒し、生命力を燃え上がらせる。\n炎の力: A monk who wields scorching flame. His hands heal wounds and ignite vitality. The power of flame brings him the miracle of healing.
水を操る修道士。\nその手は、傷を癒し、疲れた体を潤す。\n水は、彼に治癒の知恵: A monk who wields water. His hands heal wounds and refresh tired bodies. Water grants him the wisdom of healing.
大地の精霊を操る修道士。\nその手は、大地の恵みを与え、生命力を育む。\n大地の: A monk who wields a spirit of the land. His hands bestow the earth's blessings and nurture vitality. The power of the earth brings him the nourishment of recovery.
光を操る修道士。\nその手は、聖なる光を注ぎ、生命力を輝かせる。\n光の力は、彼: A monk who wields light. His hands pour sacred light and make vitality shine. The power of light brings him purifying healing.
闇を操る修道士。\nその祈りは、死の淵から生命を引き戻し、傷を癒す。\n闇の力は: A monk who wields darkness. His prayers pull life back from the brink of death and heal wounds. The power of darkness brings him forbidden healing.
虚無を操る修道士。\nその祈りは、生命を完全な状態へと回帰させる。\n虚の力は、: A monk who wields nothingness. His prayers return life to a perfect state. The power of the void brings him ultimate regeneration.
燃え盛る花弁を持つ食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す炎: A man-eating plant with blazing petals. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The fire it spews from its mouth burns everything to ashes.
凍てつく花弁を持つ食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す冷: A man-eating plant with freezing petals. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The cold it spews from its mouth freezes everything solid.
豊穣の花弁を持つ食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す胞子: A man-eating plant with abundant petals. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The spores it spews from its mouth erode everything.
聖なる花弁を持つ食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す光は: A man-eating plant with sacred petals. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The light it spews from its mouth blinds everything.
呪われた花弁を持つ食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す瘴: A man-eating plant with cursed petals. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The miasma it spews from its mouth decays everything.
花弁が咲く前の食人植物。\nその牙は鋭く獲物を逃さない。\n口から吐き出す胞子は: A man-eating plant before its petals bloom. Its fangs are sharp and never miss their prey. The spores it spews from its mouth throw prey into confusion.
灼熱の斧を振るう、牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその獰猛な突進は炎の嵐を巻き起こし、: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that wields a scorching axe. Its ferocious charge stirs up a storm of flame and burns the battlefield to ashes.
巨大な錨を振り回す、牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその荒波のような攻撃はすべてを飲み: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that swings a giant anchor. Its raging wave-like attacks swallow everything and freeze the battlefield solid.
重いこん棒を振り下ろす、牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその一撃は大地を揺るがし、\n: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that brings down a heavy club. Its strikes shake the earth and pulverize everything.
聖なる剣を掲げる、牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその光に満ちた刃は邪悪を断ち切り、\: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that raises a sacred sword. Its light-filled blade severs evil and purifies everything.
巨大ハンマーを叩きつける牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその一撃は影をも打ち砕き、\n: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that slams down a giant hammer. Its strikes shatter even shadows and dye everything in darkness.
強靭な鉄槌を振るう、牛頭人身のモンスター。\nその豪腕は、いかなる盾も打ち砕き、: A bull-headed, human-bodied monster that wields a mighty iron hammer. Its powerful arms shatter any shield and mercilessly crush enemies.
炎の鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n口から灼熱の溶岩を吐き、戦場を灰に変える。\n近づく者: A great lizard with scales of flame. It spews scorching lava from its mouth, turning the battlefield to ash. A ruler of flame that keeps all comers at bay.
氷の鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n口から極寒の氷結液を吐き相手を凍てつかせる。\n冷気を: A great lizard with scales of ice. It spews bitterly cold freezing liquid from its mouth, freezing its opponents solid. Its scales, cloaked in cold, carve frost at the slightest touch.
岩の鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n口から泥を吐き、敵を土の下に埋める。\nその姿は、大地: A great lizard with scales of rock. It spews mud from its mouth, burying enemies beneath the earth. Its form seems to embody the rage of the land.
輝く鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n眩い光を口から放ち、視界を奪い焼き尽くす。\n聖なる輝: A great lizard with shining scales. It releases dazzling light from its mouth, robbing sight and burning all. Though cloaked in sacred radiance, its true nature is that of a cold-hearted predator.
闇の鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n口から闇を吐き、相手を永遠の暗闇に閉じ込める。\n光を: A great lizard with scales of darkness. It spews darkness from its mouth, trapping its opponents in eternal gloom. Its light-devouring scales writhe eerily, luring its prey to the brink of despair.
鉄の鱗を持つ大トカゲ。\n口から透明な液体を放ち、毒牙にかける。\n無機質な鱗の: A great lizard with scales of iron. It releases a transparent liquid from its mouth, poisoning its fangs. Lurking beneath its inorganic scales is an emotionless instinct for slaughter.
呪われし力を持つ鋼鉄の守護者。\nその大剣は、侵入者を断ち切り、\nその鎧は、決: A steel guardian with a cursed power. Its greatsword cuts down intruders, and its armor will never shatter.

Normal attacks and skills have a chance of failing.
Hesitation creeps into every action.
様々な要因で戦う意志を見失った状態異常。\nスキルの使用とフォースチェインへの\:
A status ailment where one loses the will
to fight due to various factors.
Prevents the use of skills and participation in Force Chains.
前線で直接モンスターと戦う探索者の総称。\n近接戦闘だけでなく、仲間たちの盾とな:
A general term for explorers who directly fight monsters on the front lines.
They take on the role of maintaining the battle line,
ot only through melee combat but also by serving as shields for their allies.
後方から遠隔攻撃や回復を行う探索者の総称。\n魔法、弓、銃など、それぞれの得意と:
A general term for explorers who perform ranged attacks and healing from the rear.
They take on the role of unleashing their
specialized skills—magic, bows, guns, etc.—from a safe position.
戦闘には直接参加せず、探索の補助や支援を行う\n探索者の総称。アイテムや魔法など:
A general term for explorers who assist and support exploration
without directly participating in combat.
They take on the role of aiding in harsh battles by making full use of items and magic.
スタンスがアシストの探索者は自身のパラメータ\nの一部を他の探索者に加算すること:
Explorers with the Assist type can add a portion of
their own stats to other explorers.
Their roles are numerous, from supply to disruption.
一定確率で発生する、威力を秘めた特殊な攻撃。\n会心は相手の急所を突いて大ダメー:
Special powerful attacks that occur with a certain probability.
Critical hits strike the enemy's weak points for massive damage,
while combo attacks deliver swift follow-ups without letting up.
一部の探索者が持つアビリティや装備の恩恵に\nよって、通常よりも多くのドロップア:
Through the benefits of abilities
and equipment held by some explorers,
you can obtain more drop items on the battlefield than usual.
探索者は火、水、土、光、闇、無のいずれかの\n属性を持つ。敵の苦手な属性を的確に:
Explorers possess one of the following elements: Fire, Water, Earth, Light, Dark, or Neutral.
Accurately identifying the element your enemies are weak to
is the key to conquering the Abyss.
大穴では様々な装備品が出現する。\n伝説に謡われる太古の秘宝や、異世界から\n流:
A wide variety of equipment appears in the Abyss.
From ancient treasures spoken of in legends to unknown weapons washed in from other worlds—the range is vast and diverse.
厄災という未知の脅威から人類を守るため、\n大穴の素材を使って防衛設備を開発し、:
To protect humanity from the unknown threats known as the Calamities,
this is a battle to develop defense equipment using materials from the Abyss,
fortify the base, and hold the defensive line at all costs.
大穴の中で発見された素材や技術を解析し、\nアーデルハイト博士の研究によって開発:
State-of-the-art defensive weapons developed through Dr. Adelheid's research
by analyzing materials and technologies discovered within the Abyss.
Designed specifically to combat the Calamities.
モンスターの群れを一網打尽にする殲滅戦。\n一定時間内に倒したモンスターの数が戦:
An annihilation battle to wipe out swarms of monsters in one fell swoop.
The number of monsters defeated within a set time is recorded as battle results,
and rewards fluctuate accordingly.
神出鬼没の希少種を、迅速に追跡、排除する\n戦闘任務。希少な物資を溜め込んだ、\:
A combat mission to quickly track and
eliminate elusive rare species.
Targets are individuals that hoard rare supplies and are extremely wary.
マナの波長の一つ。\n増幅させることで精神の集中が極限に達し\nスキルの使用頻度:
One of the mana wavelengths.
Amplifying it brings mental focus to its peak,
increasing skill usage frequency and critical hit rate.
マナの波長の一つ。\n増幅させることで一撃の破壊力が極限に達し\n敵の防備を打ち:
One of the mana wavelengths.
Amplifying it brings the destructive power of each blow to its peak,
increasing attack power that shatters enemy defenses.
探索者はそれぞれ装備できる武器によって\n戦闘での行動や位置取りが異なる。\n支:
Depending on the weapon they can equip,
explorers differ in their combat actions and positioning.
Their roles vary widely, from support to healing and more.
片手剣と盾を組み合わせたオーソドックスな武器\n守りに長けた探索者に好まれる。\:
An orthodox weapon loadout combining a one-handed sword and shield.
Favored by explorers skilled in defense.
Delivers a swift 3-hit combo against ground enemies.
巨大な両手持ちの重量武器。\n攻守のバランスに優れた探索者が好む傾向にある。\n:
A massive two-handed heavy weapon.
Tends to be favored by explorers with a good balance of offense and defense.
Lands a heavy blow on ground enemies.
拳や体術を用いる戦闘を助ける武器。回避や\n連撃が得意な探索者が愛用する。地上の:
Weapons that aid combat using fists and martial arts.
Beloved by explorers skilled in evasion and combos.
Performs a 3-hit combo on ground enemies and steps back when evading.
一般的な遠距離攻撃用の武器。様々な絡め手と\n併用される。流れるような3連射は空:
A common ranged attack weapon.
Often used in combination with various supplementary techniques.
Its flowing 3-shot volley can attack flying enemies,
but requires a certain distance from the target.
魔法のための触媒。範囲攻撃を得意とする\n魔法使いたちの得物。一定以上離れた地上:
A catalyst for magic.
The weapon of choice for mages skilled in area attacks.
Fires single magic bullets at ground and air enemies beyond a certain distance.
火薬を用いた兵器。威力はすさまじく近距離でも\n使用できるがその分、装填に時間が:
A weapon that uses gunpowder.
Its power is tremendous and can be used at close range,
but reloading takes time and it is weak on the defensive.
Attacks ground enemies with bullets.
大穴の探索を助けるアシストたちの標準装備。\n彼らは直接戦闘には参加しないが、パ:
Standard equipment for Assist-type explorers aiding Abyss exploration.
They do not participate directly in combat,
but can add a portion of their stats to other explorers.
傷ついた心身を癒す癒し手たちの持つ魔導書。\n単体の味方のHPを回復する回復魔法:
Grimoires held by healers who mend wounded bodies
and minds. Uses recovery magic to restore
the HP of a single ally.
厄災のようなボスとの戦闘では敵を知ることも\n重要だ。特に味方や敵に付与されてい:
When battling bosses like the Calamities, knowing your enemy is also important.
In particular, within the effects applied to allies and enemies
may lie major hints for achieving victory.
異世界からやってきたルクスノヴァの\n探索者たちは戦闘でも特徴的な力を発揮する。:
Explorers from the otherworldly Luxnova
bring distinctive powers to combat as well.
Try incorporating them effectively into your formation.
大穴で発生する「瘴気」は正常な生命の働きを\n阻害する。瘴気の濃度によってマナク:
The "miasma" that emanates from the Great Abyss hinders normal life functions.
Depending on the concentration of the miasma, the efficiency with which mana is acquired—necessary
for using mana crystals—decreases.

行方知れずの姉を捜して前線基地へ来た占星術師。\\n人は嘘を吐くからと、己の占い:
An astrologer who came to the frontline base in search of her missing older sister. 
Believing that people lie, she acts based solely on her own divinations. 
Though she usually has a cool, composed demeanor, she has a habit of blurting out, “The stars are falling!” when she has a flash of insight. 
And when she opens up to the protagonist, she might even flash him a shy smile…?
精霊術によって精霊を呼び出すことができる、純真無垢な少女。\\n困っている人を助:
An innocent and pure-hearted girl who can summon spirits through spirit magic. 
Driven by a sincere desire to help those in need, she gladly accepts any request. 
She loves being praised, and when someone pats her on the head as a thank-you, she smiles with genuine joy. 
She is even beloved by spirits, who are not usually known to bond with humans; she is especially close to Popapapopa, the water spirit, and the two are always together.
